title: Supereme Back
description: Back to your lastest death position using "/trigger back" ("/back" alternatives)
body:
# SuperemeBack
> Bring you to your lastest death position using `/trigger back`

# What's new?
+ Supereme 2.0 Fixed various bugs from Old version
+ Enhance the mod's mechanic
+ Reduce lag

# [Demo](https://imgur.com/gallery/F7wwbAY)

## Try my other datapacks:
+ [**CoffeeG's Useful Snowball**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/usefulsnowball) - Useful Snowball! Make snowball slow mob.
+ [**CoffeeG's Double Jump**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffdoublejump) - Add Double Jump and Leap mechanic to minecraft with sneak button!
+ [**CoffeeG's Wall Climbing**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffwallclimb) Add the Wall Climb mechanic to minecraft
+ [**CoffeeG's Combat Overhauled**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffeegs-combat-overhauled) - Enhance minecraft combat system with MANY new weapons, items 
+ [**CoffeeG's Awful Lightning**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffeegs-awful-lightning) - Struck lightning on players more oftenly, can create fun & surprising deaths with lightning bolts.
